posts.author: 5DchessWatch
posts.title: Disney legal scrotes petitioned the FCC to consider "The View" to be a “bona fide news” show, similar to "Meet The Press" or "Face The Nation", so that the View wouldn't have to give equal time to D's and R's.

link_metadata.description: “Is The View a ‘bona fide news interview program’?” FCC Chairman Brendan Carr asked the public in Friday X post announcing that the Federal Communications Commission was opening public comment on Disney’s petition demanding a ruling in their favor. Disney’s argument hinges on the determination that The View, a bastion of liberal conspiracy theories and anti-conservative hate-mill, was actually just a “bona fide news” show and nothing less.
link_metadata.title: FCC Chairman Responds to Disney’s Claim The View Is ‘Bona Fide News’
